arts.ttl: U’s likely to appeal red card shown to Tyler Goodrham in FA Cup exit
arts.sum: OXFORD United are likely to appeal the straight red card shown to Tyler Goodrham in the closing stages of the Emirates FA Cup defeat to Exeter City.

arts.ttl: Rooney guilt helped Plymouth stun Brentford - Nancekivell
arts.sum: Plymouth caretaker Kevin Nancekivell says "guilt" over Wayne Rooney's exit helped inspire his side to their shock FA Cup win at Brentford.
